{{Quote|Eeeeeee! Eeeeeeeee!!|Cyceyed while being ejected from Chalmun's Cantina|<ref name="SWHS" />}}
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Abyssin/Legends|Abyssin]], '''Cyceyed''' was an aggressive individual who was known to visit [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] during the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. During one particular visit, Cyceyed pulled a [[Knife/Legends|knife]] on his fellow patron [[Arleil Schous/Legends|Arleil Schous]]. However, before Cyceyed could do anything with it, he was pulled away from his seat by the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina's]] [[Bouncer (occupation)/Legends|bouncer]], [[Tork]], and was forcibly ejected from the bar.

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="Blog" /> [[Abyssin/Legends|Abyssin]], Cyceyed was an aggressive individual who was known to be on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="SWHS" /> During the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="tt">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=870#15778940|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-10-12|time=6:13 PM}}</ref> Cyceyed visited [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]], located in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], a large [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. He found a table, and had a drink alongside a [[Defel/Legends|Defel]], [[Arleil Schous/Legends|Arleil Schous]]. During his visit, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] began to broadcast a live [[holodocumentary]], referred to as ''[[Life on Tatooine]]''. The broadcast reached the planet of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], where the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] [[Mallatobuck/Legends|Mallatobuck]], [[Lumpawaroo/Legends|Lumpawaroo]], and [[Attichitcuk/Legends|Attichitcuk]] watched the footage from their home alongside the Imperials who had come to visit them. The feed switched to a camera installed in the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]]. While on camera, Cyceyed became argumentative with Schous, and he eventually pulled a [[Knife/Legends|knife]] out from under his [[Clothing/Legends|clothes]]. After threatening the Defel, who continued to argue, the bar's [[Bouncer (occupation)/Legends|bouncer]], [[Tork]], grabbed the Abyssin from behind, lifting him from his seat. Although Cyceyed tried to break free, emitting a high-pitched scream at the same time, he could not escape Tork's grasp, and he was forcibly ejected from the cantina. A little while later, the rest of the cantina emptied after the Imperials issued a curfew.<ref name="SWHS" />

==Personality and traits==
Cyecyed had a temper, and could grow to be very aggressive, going as far as to brandish a weapon at someone who he disagreed with. However, when he pulled his knife on Schous, he was promptly thrown from the establishment. Although he tried to wrestle himself free from the bouncer's grasp, the Abyssin was not strong enough to do so.<ref name="SWHS" /> Cyceyed had [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and mottled brown skin. His [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] were yellow and unkempt. The Abyssin's single [[Eye/Legends|eye]]<ref name="SWHS" /> had a black iris,<ref name="DB" /> although he kept his eye closed during his encounter with Schous, not that it affected his ability to point his knife at the Defel.<ref name="SWHS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Cyceyed first appeared in ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]'', which was released in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[1978]]. His name was eventually confirmed on the [[Star Wars Blog]] article, ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special Cantina: Who's Who]]''. Cyceyed's mask is actually the very same mask seen in the film [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], where it was used for the cantina patron named [[Myo/Legends|Myo]]. Extra hair was added onto the mask for the special. Although the mask featured the ability to open and close its eye, Cyceyed's eye was closed throughout the special. <!--This Abyssin's [[canon]] name was initially unknown. [[Myo/Legends|Myo]] was originally going to be named ''Cyceyed''.<ref>{{WebCite|url=http://www.starwarsholidayspecial.com/characters/cyceyed.htm|text=Cyceyed entry on Starwarsholidayspecial.com|archivedate=20070814083031}}</ref>-->
